storyboard.content: I have severe pain in my right eye that has been getting worse over the past 24 hours
My vision in that eye has become blurry and I see halos around lights
This started 24 hours ago after I spent several hours working in a dark room, and it has been getting rapidly worse
The pain is 8 out of 10 and my vision is significantly impaired
The pain gets worse in dark rooms and when I look at bright lights
I am a 55-year-old woman and glaucoma runs in my family
